title: Codex 2026 Prompting and Repository Practice
description: Apply current Codex guidance across CLI, IDE, app, planning, and repository instructions. Learners cumulatively produce a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.
Use Plan mode or an interview when requirements are fuzzy or choices are consequential.
Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.
